context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified the Global Fact Authority implementation. The fact_resolution.py module at /app/backend/fact_resolution.py provides: (1) resolve_facts() - reads all known facts from Supabase (business_profiles, users, user_operator_profile), (2) persist_fact() - writes confirmed facts to user_operator_profile.operator_profile.fact_ledger, (3) build_known_facts_prompt() - formats facts for AI context with 'KNOWN FACTS (DO NOT RE-ASK)' header, (4) resolve_onboarding_fields() - maps fact_keys to onboarding form fields. API endpoints: GET /api/facts/resolve returns all known facts, POST /api/facts/confirm persists a single fact. The build_advisor_context function includes known_facts_prompt for AI agents. OnboardingWizard pre-populates forms using resolved_fields from the context API.

features_verified.onboarding_wizard_uses_resolved_fields: COMPLETE - Lines 55-73 apply resolved facts to form
